title: hypericum maculatum var. corymbosum
intro: Hypericum maculatum var. corymbosum, also known as spotted St. John's Wort or corymbosum St. John's Wort, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. It is a perennial herb with yellow flowers and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and wounds, due to its health benefits of promoting wound healing and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, Hypericum maculatum var. corymbosum is often used as a tincture, oil, or salve, and can be consumed as a tea or added to creams and ointments for its medicinal properties.
